'''Refinery Six-Two-Two''' was one of the fuel refineries on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Troska]] under control of the [[Kyber Royal Family]]. It was overseen by [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Torino Kyber]] and was the site of a [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison's raising of taxes. The refinery was later destroyed by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]''
